description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:latest Docker image. Define a single stage called test and a before_script that runs `apt-get update -qq > /dev/null`, installs `git-core sbcl cl-quicklisp` with `apt-get install -qq git-core sbcl cl-quicklisp > /dev/null`, executes SBCL to load Quicklisp (`sbcl --noinform --non-interactive --eval '(load "/usr/share/common-lisp/source/quicklisp/quicklisp.lisp")' --eval '(quicklisp-quickstart:install)' --eval '(ql-util:without-prompting (ql:add-to-init-file))'`), clones the zr-utils repository into `~/quicklisp/local-projects/zr-utils`, and creates a symlink from the project directory to `~/quicklisp/local-projects/zombie-raptor`. Add a test job in the test stage that runs `sbcl --non-interactive --load ~/quicklisp/local-projects/zombie-raptor/tests/test-script.lisp`. The job runs on every pipeline without additional rules, and no artifacts, caches, services, or deployment targets are defined.
